label: 多重种子
description: 借用输入对象的 DataTree 形状（仅取 branch 拓扑/paths，忽略具体 value），对每个 branch 按 (基种子, 分支path) 做确定性哈希，生成各异且可复现的 number 种子，输出一棵与输入完全同形状的种子树。典型用法：接到下游“对象+seed”电池（如 region_blocky_carve / random_rect_zone_gen）的 seed 输入上，使 DataTree 多分支 fanout 时每个分支拿到不同种子，实现逐元素多样化随机，且无需改动下游电池。
description-en: Borrow the input object's DataTree shape (branch topology / paths only, values ignored) and emit a same-shaped DataTree<number> where each branch gets a deterministic, distinct seed derived from hash(baseSeed, branchPath). Wire its output into a downstream object+seed battery's seed input to diversify random results per branch on DataTree fanout, with no change to the downstream battery.

inputs.name: shape
inputs.label: 形状
inputs.description: 任意对象的 DataTree；仅借用其形状（branch 拓扑/paths）来确定输出分支结构，忽略其具体 value。
inputs.description-en: Any object's DataTree; only its shape (branch topology / paths) is used to determine the output structure. Values are ignored.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 基种子
inputs.description: 全局基种子；0 表示用当前时间戳作为基种子（每次结果不同），非零值产生确定可复现的种子树。
inputs.description-en: Global base seed; 0 uses the current timestamp (different each run), any non-zero value yields a deterministic, reproducible seed tree.

outputs.name: seed
outputs.label: 种子
outputs.description: 与输入 shape 同形状的种子树，每个 branch 一个各异且确定的 number 种子。
outputs.description-en: A seed tree with the same shape as the input, where each branch holds a distinct, deterministic number seed.
